mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROJECT ( ID, PROJECT_TITLE, PROJECT_CONTENT, PROJECT_START_DATE, PROJECT_END_DATE, PROGRESS_DAY, PROJECT_CREATED_AT, MEMBER_ID, LOG_ID, AI_SUGGESTION_1_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_1_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_2_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_2_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_3_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_3_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_4_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_4_DESC ) VALUES ( SEQ_PROJECT.NEXTVAL, #{projectTitle}, #{projectContent}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{progressDay}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{memberId}, #{logId}, #{aiSuggestion1Title}, #{aiSuggestion1Desc}, #{aiSuggestion2Title}, #{aiSuggestion2Desc}, #{aiSuggestion3Title}, #{aiSuggestion3Desc}, #{aiSuggestion4Title}, #{aiSuggestion4Desc} )
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID AS id, TBP.PROJECT_TITLE AS projectTitle, TBP.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectStartDate, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectEndDate, TBP.PROGRESS_DAY AS progressDay, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS projectCreatedAt, TBP.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TBP.LOG_ID AS logId, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_1_TITLE AS aiSuggestion1Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_1_DESC AS aiSuggestion1Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_2_TITLE AS aiSuggestion2Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_2_DESC AS aiSuggestion2Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_3_TITLE AS aiSuggestion3Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_3_DESC AS aiSuggestion3Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_4_TITLE AS aiSuggestion4Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_4_DESC AS aiSuggestion4Desc FROM TBL_PROJECT TBP JOIN TBL_LOG TBL ON TBP.LOG_ID = TBL.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}

SELECT TBP.ID AS id, TBP.PROJECT_TITLE AS projectTitle, TBP.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectStartDate, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectEndDate, TBP.PROGRESS_DAY AS progressDay, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS projectCreatedAt, TBP.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TBP.LOG_ID AS logId FROM TBL_PROJECT TBP WHERE TBP.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT TBP.ID AS id, TBP.PROJECT_TITLE AS projectTitle, TBP.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectStartDate, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectEndDate, TBP.PROGRESS_DAY AS progressDay, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS projectCreatedAt, TBP.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TBP.LOG_ID AS logId, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl FROM TBL_PROJECT TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.MEMBER_ID != #{memberId} ORDER BY TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ID AS id, CHECKLIST_TITLE AS checklistTitle, CHECKLIST_MEMO AS checklistMemo, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED AS checklistCompleted, CHECKLIST_FAILED AS checklistFailed, CHECKLIST_PRIORITY AS checklistPriority, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId FROM TBL_CHECKLIST WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}

SELECT TBP.ID AS id, TBP.PROJECT_TITLE AS projectTitle, TBP.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectStartDate, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectEndDate, TBP.PROGRESS_DAY AS progressDay, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS projectCreatedAt, TBP.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TBP.LOG_ID AS logId, TBL.VISION_TITLE AS visionTitle, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_1_TITLE AS aiSuggestion1Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_1_DESC AS aiSuggestion1Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_2_TITLE AS aiSuggestion2Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_2_DESC AS aiSuggestion2Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_3_TITLE AS aiSuggestion3Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_3_DESC AS aiSuggestion3Desc, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_4_TITLE AS aiSuggestion4Title, TBP.AI_SUGGESTION_4_DESC AS aiSuggestion4Desc FROM TBL_PROJECT TBP JOIN TBL_LOG TBL ON TBP.LOG_ID = TBL.ID JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROJECT ( ID, PROJECT_TITLE, PROJECT_CONTENT, PROJECT_START_DATE, PROJECT_END_DATE, PROGRESS_DAY, PROJECT_CREATED_AT, MEMBER_ID, LOG_ID, AI_SUGGESTION_1_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_1_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_2_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_2_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_3_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_3_DESC, AI_SUGGESTION_4_TITLE, AI_SUGGESTION_4_DESC ) VALUES ( SEQ_PROJECT.NEXTVAL, #{projectTitle}, #{projectContent}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{progressDay}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{memberId}, #{logId}, #{aiSuggestion1Title}, #{aiSuggestion1Desc}, #{aiSuggestion2Title}, #{aiSuggestion2Desc}, #{aiSuggestion3Title}, #{aiSuggestion3Desc}, #{aiSuggestion4Title}, #{aiSuggestion4Desc} )

INSERT INTO TBL_CHECKLIST ( ID, CHECKLIST_TITLE, CHECKLIST_MEMO, CHECKLIST_COMPLETED, CHECKLIST_FAILED, CHECKLIST_PRIORITY, PROJECT_ID, MEMBER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHECKLIST.NEXTVAL, #{checklistTitle}, #{checklistMemo}, 'N', 'N', #{checklistPriority}, #{projectId}, #{memberId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PROJECT SET PROJECT_TITLE = #{projectTitle}, PROJECT_START_DATE = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), PROJECT_END_DATE = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{projectEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID AS id, TBP.PROJECT_TITLE AS projectTitle, TBP.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectStartDate, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS projectEndDate, TBP.PROGRESS_DAY AS progressDay, TO_CHAR(TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS projectCreatedAt, TBP.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TBP.LOG_ID AS logId, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS memberNickname, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS memberProfileImageUrl FROM TBL_PROJECT TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.MEMBER_ID != #{memberId} AND UPPER(TBP.PROJECT_TITLE) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY TBP.PROJECT_CREATED_AT DESC
